Key Coverages of Standard Cover There are four key sections: Section One: Building cover* Depending on your choice of coverage, provides cover for loss or damage to Your Building caused by an Accident or a Named Peril during the Policy Period Section Two: Contents cover** Provides cover for loss or damage to Contents caused by an Accident whilst contained in the Building during the Policy Period Section Three: Worldwide Family Liability (Excluding USA/Canada) Covers against claim from Third Party for property damage or bodily injury caused to them which You and Your Family is/are legally liable. Section Four: Personal Accident Covers You and Your Family against death or permanent disability as a result of an accidental injury. Includes linked panel or specialist resources.

Options Choose among our four offerings: Plan A Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $50,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $2,000 Plan B Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $100,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $4,000 Plan C Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $200,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $6,000 Plan D Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $300,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $8,000 Important Notes Here is are some key points to take note: All amounts shown are in Singapore Dollars Benefits under this insurance will be payable only upon death, permanent disablement or injury due to an accident. All those who are insured must be a Singapore citizen, Singapore Permanent Resident or foreigner who is holding a valid employment pass, work permit, dependent pass, student pass or social visit pass and residing in Singapore. plans.plan_overview: Secure your journey, safeguard your vehicle with our comprehensive motor insurance From as low as S$500/Year As a driver, driving a vehicle on the road carries different risks, whether it is damage to your own car or getting a claim from a third-party in an accident. If you have just purchased a new car or bike, you would want to get your vehicle insured as soon as possible. Motor insurance is one of the key essentials, yet often overlooked aspects of owning a motor vehicle in Singapore. There are several types of bike and car insurance plans as well as insurers to select from in Singapore. However, knowing which one suits your needs best is crucial. Most motor vehicle owners typically go for the cheapest car insurance. However, rather than prioritising just cost, being aware of what the policy covers and the variety of coverage available are the ideal ways to purchase the best motor insurance . If you are looking for affordable motor vehicle insurance, India International Insurance is able to provide you with the right solution. With our comprehensive coverage, you are assured of protection and coverage of your motor vehicle, the other party's motor vehicle, and, most importantly, yourself while driving or riding on the road. Our policy also provides you with added coverage over loss from natural disasters and theft.

plans.plan_overview: Planning a dream getaway or business trip? With over 30 years of experience, III offers reliable travel insurance plans to protect you every step of the way. Get peace of mind knowing you're covered, from unexpected delays to medical emergencies. FROM LESS THAN S$ 0.8/DAY Travel insurance, also known as travellers insurance, is the best way to protect yourself from financial loss due to the unexpected. Travelling is an exciting experience, but anything can happen while you're away from home. Moreover, certain countries require proof of sufficient travel insurance as a condition of entry or visa approval. Specific coverage and benefits vary, but most comprehensive travel insurance policies offer benefits including trip cancellation, flight cancellation, baggage delay, loss of baggage, trip interruption, travel accident coverage, medical benefits and emergency medical evacuation, loss of passport and travel documents, kidnap/ransom requests, and many other travel-related events and expenses. A leisure or business trip — wherever your travels take you — we offer coverage to protect your international trips with our globally accepted and affordable travel insurance policies. Don't leave home without knowing where to buy travel insurance in Singapore. You can even purchase travel insurance online for added convenience. Get cheap travel insurance quotes today and travel with peace of mind.

plan_benefits: Boost your savings at 1.5% p.a.* from day one. No fees, no lock-ins, no nonsense. We promise.
The Singlife Account Is Not Just a Savings Plan. It’s an Insurance Savings Solution.
Singlife Account Key Features and Benefits
Insurance benefits

Note that all crediting rates are not guaranteed. The Singlife Account is an insurance savings plan. It is neither a bank savings account nor a fixed deposit. Each person is only entitled to one Singlife Account.
Your Singlife Account will be in force with an initial premium of S$100. Subsequently, you may use FAST at any time to transfer funds to your personal account(s) via the Singlife App.
The minimum account value is S$100. There will be no returns or benefits with your Singlife Account if this value falls below S$100.

With the Singlife Account, your policy is also safeguarded under the Policy Owners' Protection Scheme , administered by the Singapore Deposit Insurance Corporation (SDIC) – giving you added peace of mind.

plan_benefits: At Chubb, when it comes to helping you protect your valuable possessions, we go beyond your expectations. Our Masterpiece ® policy provides coverage for individuals with significant assets to protect, and who appreciate superior levels of insurance cover and service for their homes, contents, fine art, jewellery, antiques, collections and personal liability.

Right from the start, you’ll see that Chubb is different. We don’t simply process claims. We look for ways to prevent damage from happening and go out of our way to make the claim process easy for you if something happens to you or your valued possessions.
Chubb’s flagship prestige home and valuables offering for families and individuals with significant assets to insure and who appreciate a premium level of cover and service.

A kitchen fire broke out in an apartment and our customer incurred fees for temporary accommodation and for the replacement cost of damaged appliances and furniture. Chubb paid S$93,000 for this claim.
Handbags were stolen from our customer's home in Singapore and were never recovered. Chubb paid S$140,000 to replace the bags.

We agree with you upfront, exactly what is insured and for how much. This eliminates over and under-insurance, and any haggling after the event. We also offer ‘agreed value’ for valuables and fine art - so you know the exact sum you will receive in the event of a loss.
We provide ‘all risks’ cover (including accidental damage) with minimal restrictive conditions, no under-insurance penalties and no small print. It comes from understanding what we are insuring.
The moment you make a claim, we are ready to deal with it in a fast, fair and fuss-free way.

"Chubb Masterpiece is a must have product for keeping all the belongings of you and your family secure and giving you peace of mind. My pride and joy watch was badly damaged in an accident and the claim was handled extremely quickly and professionally. And this isn't the first time Chubb and their agents have swooped to the rescue in such a fashion. The lifesaver that transformed my feelings of heartbreak into relief was Gayle Shepherdson. Thank you Gayle." - Mike P.

"We have insured with Chubb for the past 7 years in Singapore and in that time had to claim for 2 items, both of which were accidental damages. Chubb have been very prompt, very helpful, and very quick in processing our claims, none of which I could fault. Whilst there are cheaper offers in the marketplace for contents insurance I would thoroughly recommend Chubb as you get what you pay for. I have heard of many a nightmare claims with other insurance companies. Chubb have been in my opinion by far the best contents insurance company to deal with and would thoroughly recommend them." - Nigel C.

"I submitted a claim for my home insurance as my home alarm system was damaged by lightning strike. Chubb team was very professional and responsive with guiding me (on) the process and paperwork to get my claim done. Very impressed with Gayle Shepherdson who represented Chubb in dealing with my claim. Good job." - TC Ng
"I feel confident recommending Chubb’s products because of their sterling history in claims handling and customer service."

plan_benefits: With Chubb PAL Protect ® II (Chubb Personal Accident & Lifestyle Protect ® II), you can rest easy knowing that you and your loved ones are covered for accident-related injuries and disabilities, as well as up to 14 types of covered diseases.
Up to S$1,000,000 lump sum payout to your estate in the event of accidental death. Coverage amount is doubled if the accident happens on a public conveyance.
Receive reimbursement for your medical expenses - including treatment by an alternative medical physician such as Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) practitioner or a chiropractor.
Covers 14 infectious diseases including Dengue Fever, Hand, Foot & Mouth Disease (HFMD), food poisoning, and more.
Free automatic dependent child(ren) cover for Couple Plan (up to 4 children).
plans.plan_description: Accidents happen whenever and wherever you least expect them. That's why a comprehensive personal accident insurance that provides cover when you are abroad is so important. Contact Chubb Singapore for more information.
plans.plan_overview: We understand that accidents can happen when you least expect them, leading to unplanned financial expenses and burden on you and your family. With Chubb PAL Protect ® II (Chubb Personal Accident & Lifestyle Protect ® II), you can rest easy knowing that you and your loved ones are covered for accident-related injuries and disabilities, as well as up to 14 types of covered diseases. When you make contingencies for the unexpected, you can better protect yourself and your loved ones. Up to S$1,000,000 lump sum payout to your estate in the event of accidental death. Coverage amount is doubled if the accident happens on a public conveyance.

plan_benefits: Dental care in Singapore can be costly. Often overlooked, dental care costs are usually not extensively covered in basic health insurance plans. Yet, routine dental visits and preventive treatments are essential to maintain your dental health.

To help you manage the high cost of dental bills, Chubb offers dental insurance, through our partners and intermediaries, to provide coverage for a variety of treatments, from emergency dental treatments to routine dental visits for cleaning and fluoride.
Coverage on emergency dental treatments, routine preventive treatments and X-rays
Coverage on teeth extractions and root canal treatments
The Dental Insurance is distributed through our partners and intermediaries. If you are keen to partner with Chubb, get in touch with us.

Worldwide coverage

Convertibility benefit 4 Later in life, you may change to any whole life or endowment plan (that is available to you at that point in time) without medical underwriting.
Unemployment support benefit 5 You may pay your premium at a later date (up to 365 days) if you become unemployed.
Guaranteed cash value 1 When you no longer need the coverage, you can surrender your policy and receive the guaranteed cash value of your policy (available for only limited pay option).
Disability Cover Provides you with financial support should you suffer total and permanent disability.
Advance CI Waiver Waives all future premiums of the basic plan and any selected riders, should you be diagnosed with any of the covered critical illness (CI) conditions.

Flexible premium payment options Choose your premium payment term to age 70 or 85 to suit your commitment level.
Buying a life insurance policy is a long term commitment. An early termination of the policy usually incurs a high cost and the surrender value payable may be less than the total premiums paid.

1 The total and permanent disability benefit payable on all policies issued by HSBC Life (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. and other insurance companies for a life insured is capped at an aggregate of S$3,000,000 per life.
3 The reversionary and terminal bonuses are not guaranteed. With regard to the reversionary bonus, once declared it forms part of the guaranteed benefits of your policy.

4 The DIRECT - Critical Illness Benefit II payable on all policies issued by HSBC Life (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. and other insurance companies for a life insured is capped at an aggregate of S$2,000,000 per life.

plan_benefits: HSBC Life Cancer ReCover is the first plan in Singapore to cover cancer survivors for recurrent or new primary cancers. You fought, you bounced back, and we're here to support you, no matter what the future brings.
She purchases our HSBC Life Cancer ReCover policy, with a basic sum assured of SGD100,000 and a policy term of 15 years. She'll pay a monthly premium of SGD263[@rounded-figure] for 15 years.
She receives a payout of SGD15,000 (15% of the sum assured).
We'll waive her premiums[@recover-premium-waiver] for the next 24 months to support her journey to recovery.
She receives a payout of SGD85,000 (the remaining 85% of the sum assured). Her policy then terminates.
They must have only 1 previous cancer[@medical-history]
The maximum coverage age is 70 years old.

Supported even in difficult times Get a 36-month premium waiver in the event of a critical illness diagnosis, upon cumulative claims of 50% of the sum assured under your female illness benefit, capped at 2 claims.
Extend your cover to your child Your child will receive free coverage of up to SGD5,000[@for-her-him-child] in the event that they're diagnosed with critical illness.

Sally is a 30-year old married mother of 2 children. She opts for our HSBC Life CritiCare for Her policy and a premium term of 20 years, with a sum assured of SGD100,000. She'll pay an annual premium of SGD1,470.
She receives a payout of SGD50,000 (50% of the sum assured) under her female illness benefit.
We'll also waive her premiums for the next 36 months.

At your service, anytime and anywhere Find support whenever you need it from our 24/7 HSBC Life medical concierge team.

Options We provide three main types of motor insurance: Comprehensive Approved Workshops Plan Other Workshops Plan Third Party Fire and Theft Third Party How much is my premium? Your premium may vary, depending on: 1 Our underwriting criteria 2 Your No Claim Discount (NCD) entitlement Step on the assurance. Drive up your confidence

Key Coverages of Standard Cover There are four key sections: Section One: Building cover* Depending on your choice of coverage, provides cover for loss or damage to Your Building caused by an Accident or a Named Peril during the Policy Period Section Two: Contents cover** Provides cover for loss or damage to Contents caused by an Accident whilst contained in the Building during the Policy Period Section Three: Worldwide Family Liability (Excluding USA/Canada) Covers against claim from Third Party for property damage or bodily injury caused to them which You and Your Family is/are legally liable. Section Four: Personal Accident Covers You and Your Family against death or permanent disability as a result of an accidental injury. Includes linked panel or specialist resources.

Options Choose among our four offerings: Plan A Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $50,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $2,000 Plan B Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $100,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $4,000 Plan C Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $200,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $6,000 Plan D Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $300,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $8,000 Important Notes Here is are some key points to take note: All amounts shown are in Singapore Dollars Benefits under this insurance will be payable only upon death, permanent disablement or injury due to an accident. All those who are insured must be a Singapore citizen, Singapore Permanent Resident or foreigner who is holding a valid employment pass, work permit, dependent pass, student pass or social visit pass and residing in Singapore. Includes linked panel or specialist resources.

SunBrilliance Whole Life is a life insurance policy that gives you lifetime protection with 3 options for Guaranteed Death Benefit and flexibility in premium payment terms. plans.plan_overview: Secure your journey, safeguard your vehicle with our comprehensive motor insurance From as low as S$500/Year As a driver, driving a vehicle on the road carries different risks, whether it is damage to your own car or getting a claim from a third-party in an accident. If you have just purchased a new car or bike, you would want to get your vehicle insured as soon as possible. Motor insurance is one of the key essentials, yet often overlooked aspects of owning a motor vehicle in Singapore. There are several types of bike and car insurance plans as well as insurers to select from in Singapore. However, knowing which one suits your needs best is crucial. Most motor vehicle owners typically go for the cheapest car insurance. However, rather than prioritising just cost, being aware of what the policy covers and the variety of coverage available are the ideal ways to purchase the best motor insurance . If you are looking for affordable motor vehicle insurance, India International Insurance is able to provide you with the right solution. With our comprehensive coverage, you are assured of protection and coverage of your motor vehicle, the other party's motor vehicle, and, most importantly, yourself while driving or riding on the road. Our policy also provides you with added coverage over loss from natural disasters and theft.

plans.plan_overview: Planning a dream getaway or business trip? With over 30 years of experience, III offers reliable travel insurance plans to protect you every step of the way. Get peace of mind knowing you're covered, from unexpected delays to medical emergencies. FROM LESS THAN S$ 0.8/DAY Travel insurance, also known as travellers insurance, is the best way to protect yourself from financial loss due to the unexpected. Travelling is an exciting experience, but anything can happen while you're away from home. Moreover, certain countries require proof of sufficient travel insurance as a condition of entry or visa approval. Specific coverage and benefits vary, but most comprehensive travel insurance policies offer benefits including trip cancellation, flight cancellation, baggage delay, loss of baggage, trip interruption, travel accident coverage, medical benefits and emergency medical evacuation, loss of passport and travel documents, kidnap/ransom requests, and many other travel-related events and expenses. A leisure or business trip — wherever your travels take you — we offer coverage to protect your international trips with our globally accepted and affordable travel insurance policies. Don't leave home without knowing where to buy travel insurance in Singapore. You can even purchase travel insurance online for added convenience. Get cheap travel insurance quotes today and travel with peace of mind.

plan_benefits: Dependants' Protection Scheme
Your family deserves the greatest protection.
Over 2 million Singaporeans and Permanent Residents are currently covered under the Dependants’ Protection Scheme (DPS).
DPS is a term-life insurance scheme administered by Great Eastern Life to cover death, terminal illness 1 and total permanent disability 2 through your CPF. No cash needed 3 .
How do you stay covered under DPS?
You are automatically enrolled when you make a valid CPF working contribution. Policyholder is encouraged to submit the Health Declaration for assessment on eligible coverage.

plan_benefits: Boost your savings at 1.5% p.a.* from day one. No fees, no lock-ins, no nonsense. We promise.
The Singlife Account Is Not Just a Savings Plan. It’s an Insurance Savings Solution.
Singlife Account Key Features and Benefits
Insurance benefits

Note that all crediting rates are not guaranteed. The Singlife Account is an insurance savings plan. It is neither a bank savings account nor a fixed deposit. Each person is only entitled to one Singlife Account.
Your Singlife Account will be in force with an initial premium of S$100. Subsequently, you may use FAST at any time to transfer funds to your personal account(s) via the Singlife App.
The minimum account value is S$100. There will be no returns or benefits with your Singlife Account if this value falls below S$100.

With the Singlife Account, your policy is also safeguarded under the Policy Owners' Protection Scheme , administered by the Singapore Deposit Insurance Corporation (SDIC) – giving you added peace of mind.

plan_benefits: At Chubb, when it comes to helping you protect your valuable possessions, we go beyond your expectations. Our Masterpiece ® policy provides coverage for individuals with significant assets to protect, and who appreciate superior levels of insurance cover and service for their homes, contents, fine art, jewellery, antiques, collections and personal liability.

Right from the start, you’ll see that Chubb is different. We don’t simply process claims. We look for ways to prevent damage from happening and go out of our way to make the claim process easy for you if something happens to you or your valued possessions.
Chubb’s flagship prestige home and valuables offering for families and individuals with significant assets to insure and who appreciate a premium level of cover and service.

A kitchen fire broke out in an apartment and our customer incurred fees for temporary accommodation and for the replacement cost of damaged appliances and furniture. Chubb paid S$93,000 for this claim.
Handbags were stolen from our customer's home in Singapore and were never recovered. Chubb paid S$140,000 to replace the bags.

We agree with you upfront, exactly what is insured and for how much. This eliminates over and under-insurance, and any haggling after the event. We also offer ‘agreed value’ for valuables and fine art - so you know the exact sum you will receive in the event of a loss.
We provide ‘all risks’ cover (including accidental damage) with minimal restrictive conditions, no under-insurance penalties and no small print. It comes from understanding what we are insuring.
The moment you make a claim, we are ready to deal with it in a fast, fair and fuss-free way.

"Chubb Masterpiece is a must have product for keeping all the belongings of you and your family secure and giving you peace of mind. My pride and joy watch was badly damaged in an accident and the claim was handled extremely quickly and professionally. And this isn't the first time Chubb and their agents have swooped to the rescue in such a fashion. The lifesaver that transformed my feelings of heartbreak into relief was Gayle Shepherdson. Thank you Gayle." - Mike P.

"We have insured with Chubb for the past 7 years in Singapore and in that time had to claim for 2 items, both of which were accidental damages. Chubb have been very prompt, very helpful, and very quick in processing our claims, none of which I could fault. Whilst there are cheaper offers in the marketplace for contents insurance I would thoroughly recommend Chubb as you get what you pay for. I have heard of many a nightmare claims with other insurance companies. Chubb have been in my opinion by far the best contents insurance company to deal with and would thoroughly recommend them." - Nigel C.

"I submitted a claim for my home insurance as my home alarm system was damaged by lightning strike. Chubb team was very professional and responsive with guiding me (on) the process and paperwork to get my claim done. Very impressed with Gayle Shepherdson who represented Chubb in dealing with my claim. Good job." - TC Ng
"I feel confident recommending Chubb’s products because of their sterling history in claims handling and customer service."

Up to S$1,000,000 lump sum payout to your estate in the event of accidental death. Coverage amount is doubled if the accident happens on a public conveyance.

With Chubb PAL Protect ® II (Chubb Personal Accident & Lifestyle Protect ® II), you can rest easy knowing that you and your loved ones are covered for accident-related injuries and disabilities, as well as up to 14 types of covered diseases. When you make contingencies for the unexpected, you can better protect yourself and your loved ones. Up to S$1,000,000 lump sum payout to your estate in the event of accidental death. Coverage amount is doubled if the accident happens on a public conveyance.

plan_benefits: Dental care in Singapore can be costly. Often overlooked, dental care costs are usually not extensively covered in basic health insurance plans. Yet, routine dental visits and preventive treatments are essential to maintain your dental health.

To help you manage the high cost of dental bills, Chubb offers dental insurance, through our partners and intermediaries, to provide coverage for a variety of treatments, from emergency dental treatments to routine dental visits for cleaning and fluoride.
Coverage on emergency dental treatments, routine preventive treatments and X-rays
Coverage on teeth extractions and root canal treatments
The Dental Insurance is distributed through our partners and intermediaries. If you are keen to partner with Chubb, get in touch with us.

plan_benefits: Mobile phones have become a vital part of our lives, and many of us are heavily reliant on them. So, it makes sense to take steps to protect them. What happens if your mobile phone is damaged? Accidental and malicious cover for devices up to 36 months old, at point of enrolment
Worldwide coverage
The Mobile Phone Insurance is distributed through our partners and intermediaries. If you are keen to partner with Chubb, get in touch with us.

plan_benefits: With HSBC Life Term Protect Advantage, you have the flexibility to choose your preferred premium and policy term, and receive the cash value 1 , when the coverage is no longer needed.
Affordable protection coverage 2 Challenging times call for an affordable policy, which protects you against death and terminal illness, so you can allocate your money to where you need it most.
Flexible premium and policy term Take control of your financial future by choosing the term of your coverage and how long you wish to pay for it.
Convertibility benefit 4 Later in life, you may change to any whole life or endowment plan (that is available to you at that point in time) without medical underwriting.
Unemployment support benefit 5 You may pay your premium at a later date (up to 365 days) if you become unemployed.
Guaranteed cash value 1 When you no longer need the coverage, you can surrender your policy and receive the guaranteed cash value of your policy (available for only limited pay option).
Disability Cover Provides you with financial support should you suffer total and permanent disability.
Advance CI Waiver Waives all future premiums of the basic plan and any selected riders, should you be diagnosed with any of the covered critical illness (CI) conditions.

plan_benefits: Your benefits at a glance:
Enhance your protection cover Include the optional benefit, DIRECT - Critical Illness Benefit II 4 to enhance your protection cover and peace of mind.
Flexible premium payment options Choose your premium payment term to age 70 or 85 to suit your commitment level.
Buying a life insurance policy is a long term commitment. An early termination of the policy usually incurs a high cost and the surrender value payable may be less than the total premiums paid.

1 The total and permanent disability benefit payable on all policies issued by HSBC Life (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. and other insurance companies for a life insured is capped at an aggregate of S$3,000,000 per life.
3 The reversionary and terminal bonuses are not guaranteed. With regard to the reversionary bonus, once declared it forms part of the guaranteed benefits of your policy.

4 The DIRECT - Critical Illness Benefit II payable on all policies issued by HSBC Life (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. and other insurance companies for a life insured is capped at an aggregate of S$2,000,000 per life.

plan_benefits: It's also the first prenatal plan in Singapore to cover early delivery by caesarean section for pregnant mothers. This way, you can take one worry off your mind and get back to welcoming your newest family member.
Covered for congenital conditions Receive 100% of the sum assured[@terminate-once-paid] if the newborn is diagnosed with any of the 26 covered congenital illnesses.
Covered for developmental delays Receive 15% of the sum assured (up to SGD3,000) if the newborn is diagnosed with developmental delay in their gross motor or speech development[@developmental-delay].

The option to transfer protection You can opt to transfer your HSBC Life Flexi Protector or HSBC Life – Life Treasure III coverage from mother to newborn without underwriting, within 60 days of birth.
Safeguarded during hospitalisation Get 2% of the sum assured per day of hospitalisation[@hospitalisation-30] due to any of the 17 covered hospitalisation events of the newborn, for up to 30 days.
Protected in the event of death Receive 100% of the sum assured in the event that the newborn passes away.
You can enhance your newborn's protection further by bundling up your HSBC Life HappyFamily policy with these covers.

plan_benefits: HSBC Life Cancer ReCover is the first plan in Singapore to cover cancer survivors for recurrent or new primary cancers. You fought, you bounced back, and we're here to support you, no matter what the future brings.
She purchases our HSBC Life Cancer ReCover policy, with a basic sum assured of SGD100,000 and a policy term of 15 years. She'll pay a monthly premium of SGD263[@rounded-figure] for 15 years.
She receives a payout of SGD15,000 (15% of the sum assured).
We'll waive her premiums[@recover-premium-waiver] for the next 24 months to support her journey to recovery.
She receives a payout of SGD85,000 (the remaining 85% of the sum assured). Her policy then terminates.
They must have only 1 previous cancer[@medical-history]
The maximum coverage age is 70 years old.

plan_benefits: Stay on top of your health Enjoy free biennial health check-ups worth up to SGD400[@for-her-him-checkup], available once every 2 policy years, starting from your policy's 25th month.

Supported even in difficult times Get a 36-month premium waiver in the event of a critical illness diagnosis, upon cumulative claims of 50% of the sum assured under your female illness benefit, capped at 2 claims.
Extend your cover to your child Your child will receive free coverage of up to SGD5,000[@for-her-him-child] in the event that they're diagnosed with critical illness.

Sally is a 30-year old married mother of 2 children. She opts for our HSBC Life CritiCare for Her policy and a premium term of 20 years, with a sum assured of SGD100,000. She'll pay an annual premium of SGD1,470.
She receives a payout of SGD50,000 (50% of the sum assured) under her female illness benefit.
We'll also waive her premiums for the next 36 months.
After a waiting period of 12 months, her female illness benefit resets[@female-illness] to the original 100% of the sum assured.
She receives a payout of SGD100,000 (100% of the sum assured) under her female illness benefit.
